title: Marketplace Manager - Croma Holdings Services - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Croma Holdings Services - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Croma Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Croma Holdings Services:
Croma Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma Holdings Services!
